summary: Fixed cron.mjs:101 to build the ready pool explicitly via a recoveredItems array instead of mutating listProjectItems result objects in-place, eliminating the implicit ordering dependency. Added a printed note to cmdCronSetup output advising users to re-run 'agt cron-setup' after Node upgrades or project moves. Stored full test runner output (558 tests, 556 pass, 2 skipped, 0 fail) as a task artifact.
